creator: Nakata@FreeBSD.org
text:
I made several ports for free Java alternative (gcc41-withgcjawt,
ecj-bootstrap, gjdoc, java-gcj-compat) and they depend on the gcc41.
However, gcc42 includes much more better Java support than gcc41,
even though gcc42 is a development state. IMHO gcc41-withgcjawt
have some commit logs, and gcc42-withgcjawt should share it.
this is the reason for requesting the repocopy operation.

Fix: 

repocopy, please
How-To-Repeat: N/A
